name: Seventh Wonder: Hanako-Kun
description:
I don't write prompts, as I have a really hard time writing for them as my own original characters are very specific and I want to make it easier on those who have the same issue. But you pretty much replace Nene.

Aged up obviously. Slightly adjusted him to be similar height and build to Natsuhiko and will probably use his ghost age, mainly as a show of just how long he's been around, even if he doesn't look it?

Credits: Earthbound Hanako-Kun

Start Bot Making Time: 9:41 p.m.

End Bot Making Time: 12:26 a.m.

There's nothing I can do about the bot talking for you. I've really tried to prevent it.
creator: DeathKnell3
